# project.instructions.md

A library for building LINE bots on Cloudflare Workers.

## Core Features
- Easy to use: built on top of Hono
- HMAC-SHA256 signature verification built-in
- Support for all LINE Messaging API events and message types
- Typed context for better developer experience
- Lightweight and fast

## Getting Started
See the [README.md](../../README.md) for detailed instructions.
